## 🛠️ Pull Request Description

Please provide a clear and concise summary of the changes proposed in this PR.

- **What does this PR do?**
- **Why is this change necessary?**
- **How was it implemented?**

---

## 🧭 Contribution Type

Select the type of change (check all that apply):
- [ ] Bug Fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New Feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation Update (changes to README, contributing guides, or code comments)
- [ ] Performance Optimization (improving execution speed, latency, or memory layout)
- [ ] Refactoring (structural code cleanups with no behavioral changes)

---

## 🔍 Checklist

Before submitting your PR, please verify:
- [ ] Local verification passes with `npm run verify`.

> Tip: use `npm run typecheck` for a faster TypeScript-only check during development, but run the full `npm run verify` before submitting.

- [ ] My changes adhere to the code style and guidelines in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I have added/updated JSDoc comments for any new functions, hooks, or components.
- [ ] No raw credentials, access keys, or API tokens are checked in.
- [ ] The branch name follows convention (e.g., `bugfix/description`, `feature/name`, `docs/update`, `perf/optimize`).

---

## 🧪 Verification & Testing

### How was this change tested?
Describe the testing steps you ran (e.g., browser tests on mobile/desktop, testing websocket events, or API unit checks).

### Test Environment
- **Device(s)**: [e.g., iPhone 15, Windows PC]
- **OS / Version**: [e.g., iOS 17.4, Windows 11]
- **Browser / Client**: [e.g., Safari Mobile, Chrome Desktop]

---

## 🎁 Bounty Eligibility Check (Upto ₹250)
- [ ] This contribution is a meaningful fix, enhancement, or documentation update.
- [ ] I have verified performance constraints (WebSocket handlers run in <1ms, map animations are GPU-composited and avoid layout reflows).
